'''Rascal Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], likely temporary, which was formed in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] in order to [[Battle of Arah|destroy]] an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Arah mining facility|mining facility]] in the [[Arah asteroid belt|Belt of Arah]], but was destroyed by [[TIE/ph "Phantom" Multi-Role Stealth Starfighter/Legends|Phantom TIEs]] soon after completing their task. The sole survivor was [[Rookie One]].

==Notable Members==
*Rascal 1 - [[Ace Merrick]]
*Rascal 2 - "[[Rookie One]]"
*Rascal 3 - [[Ina Rece]]

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Rebel Assault II: The Hidden Empire]]'' {{1st}}
